articles.summary: Zobacz zmiany kursu tureckiej liry do polskiego złotego (TRY/PLN). Czy lira, jedna z najszybciej tracących wartość w ostatnich latach walut na świcie, ponownie się osłabiła? Czy aktualnie opłaca się wymieniać liry na inne waluty w tym polską?

articles.title: Polska pierwsza podpisuje historyczną umowę. Minister mówi, jaki będzie efekt udziału w SAFE
articles.summary: W piątek Polska — jako pierwszy kraj Unii Europejskiej — potwierdzi swój udział w programie SAFE. To dowód na to, że rząd skutecznie ominął weto prezydenta. Czy równie skutecznie zrealizuje ambitne cele, jakie stawia sobie w związku z tym programem? Minister aktywów państwowych Wojciech Balczun w rozmowie z nami jasno stawia sprawę.

articles.title: Oil futures rise after U.S., Iran trade fire; stock futures quiet after court rejects Trump’s tariffs
articles.summary: Oil futures moved higher late Thursday while stock-index futures were little changed after the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire in the Persian Gulf, and after a federal court struck down President Donald Trump’s backup tariff plan.

articles.title: Cloudflare to cut 20% of staff in a big bet on AI. Investors aren’t sold.
articles.summary: The company’s stock falls as co-founders say the layoffs are “not a cost-cutting exercise.”

articles.title: Iren’s stock soars as a major Nvidia investment overshadows revenue shortfall
articles.summary: Nvidia is taking a major stake in Iren to build out a 5-gigawatt global footprint for its AI factory ambitions

articles.title: SoundHound’s stock falls as acquisitions weigh on earnings results
articles.summary: The company said revenue would’ve grown more not counting its recent acquisitions, but analysts say they put SoundHound in a strong position.

articles.title: Airbnb is seeing some of its fastest growth from this surprising segment
articles.summary: The travel app has seen some demand disruptions from the Iran war, but is showing early success with its recent pivot into offering hotel bookings

articles.title: AI is coming for your job after all. These new announcements prove it.
articles.summary: The tech sector is leading a rush of mass layoffs. Cloudflare, Upwork and Bill outlined big cuts on Thursday, following Coinbase’s announcement earlier in the week.

articles.title: 5 reasons stocks are rallying in the face of an oil-price shock
articles.summary: U.S. stocks were lower Thursday but still higher for the week, with the S&P 500 on the verge of breaking above 7,400 for the first time ever.
